content.text:
🇺🇸 ETH ETF flows remain resilient despite market chop.

While BTC ETFs saw $930M inflows yesterday (per Farside), Ethereum's ETHA (BlackRock) continues steady accumulation.

Key data:
• ETH price: $1,879 (+0.05% 24h)
• Fear & Greed: 28 (FEAR — contrarian opportunity)
• BTC ETF dominance: ~75% of total inflows
• ETH/BTC ratio: ~2.88% — institutional preference still skews BTC

The narrative: Institutions are building positions methodically. Not the euphoria of early 2024, but sustainable accumulation.

Watch the ETHA AUM trendline — breaks above $3B would signal accelerating institutional appetite.

metadata.expected_engagement: Medium — institutional data resonates with serious followers
